response.overview: Isiatinu is a young woman passionate about the art of drumming, in a community where this practice is forbidden for women. After facing discrimination, she decides to flee into the wilderness, guided by her ancestral spirits who seem to be calling her. Throughout her journey—during which she communicates through the distant beats of her own drum—Isiatinu faces challenges that help her gain strength and determination, training until she masters the instrument enough to convince her community of her talent.
response.title: Lumalalí Garawón
